items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis will perform better following his loss to Dustin Poirier.
items.quote: if anything, I think he's going to be better.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett should have taken a longer break to recover from the damage sustained in his previous fight.
items.quote: Maybe Paddy should have taken two or four months more off. A lot of damage.

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis won the second round of his fight against Islam Makhachev despite having impaired vision.
items.quote: he still won the second round where he couldn't even see, dude.

items.claim: Ethan Ewing has withdrawn from his UFC 299 bout due to an injury.
items.quote: Ethan Ewing has pulled out because of an injury.

items.claim: It is difficult for a replacement fighter to prepare for a fight on less than two weeks' notice.
items.quote: good luck fighting me on less than two weeks notice.
